Records.description: Two-loop four-point integral family (sector 79) with one internal mass $m$ and five massive propagators plus four ISPs, relevant as a sub-topology of the planar double-box for top-pair production with a closed top loop. The family depends on two kinematic variables $s$ and $t$ and is associated with two elliptic curves: curve (a) from the sunrise sub-graph (sector 73) and curve (b) from the maximal cut of sector 79. The differential equation for the 12 master integrals is transformed to an epsilon-form. The connection matrix entries include dlog-forms, modular forms, Kronecker-function-related one-forms, and novel mixed one-forms depending on both elliptic curves.
Records.location: Eq. (3)-(6), Section 2.1; master integrals in Eq. (16), Section 3
